blocks.text: Hovland and Reitan chase glory at Valspar — Norway's golf morning
Thursday is a Norwegian golf double-header. Hovland hunts a PGA Tour win at Valspar while Halvorsen flies the flag on the DP World Tour in Hainan.
🚴 Spring Classics 2026 continues — Abrahamsen, Leknessund & Norwegian squad still in action across Western Europe
